entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00037) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: IMMEDIATE OFFICE OF THE SECRETARY OF DEFENSE

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE A 2-MONTH NO COST EXTENSION FOR THE ADA LTE PROTOTYPE AND 4-MONTH NO COST EXTENSION FOR THE UAS PROTOTYPE.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00038) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $251,641.22

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: IMMEDIATE OFFICE OF THE SECRETARY OF DEFENSE

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE ATHENA CHANGE PROPOSAL DATED 16 APRIL 2019, WHICH ADDS ADDITIONAL SOLUTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $239,658.31.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00039) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $2,487,446

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE INCREMENTAL FUNDING AND EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00040) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of -$53,481.18

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TERMINATION FOR CONVENIENCE FOR THE LV RATIO EFFORT, WHICH DE-OBLIGATES $58,495.13 FROM CLIN 1060. INCORPORATE A 6 WEEK NO COST EXTENSION FOR THE ADA LTE EFFORT ON CLIN 1040.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00041) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $716,190.81

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCREMENTALLY FUND CLIN 1000 IN THE AMOUNT OF $845,321 FOR THE SCETI PROTOTYPE EFFORT UNDER OTA AGREEMENT W900KK-18-9-0005.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00042) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $275,000

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR CONTRACT LINE ITEM (CLIN) 2000 FOR UNMANNED AERIAL SYSTEM INSTRUMENTATION DEVICE AND EXERCISE OPTION CLIN 0002 FOR PROGRAM SUPPORT-FISCAL YEAR 2020.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00043) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $1,369,144

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD FUNDING TO CLINS 1020, 1021, 1022, AND 1023 IN SUPPORT OF THE JMAS EFFORT AND UPDATE THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) IN SUPPORT OF THE UAS EFFORT.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00044) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $3,101,916

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD FUNDING TO CLINS 2080-2084 FOR THE MITS PROTOTYPE EFFORT.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00045) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of -$1,369,144

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DEOBLIGATE FUNDING FROM CLINS 1020-1023 DUE A LINE OF ACCOUNTING ERROR FOR THE JMAS EFFORT.

entry.title: OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W900KK1890005 (P00046) awarded to DEFENSE ENERGY CENTER OF EXCELLENCE, was modified for the amount of $215,109

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE CHANGE PROPOSAL DATED 8 NOVEMBER 2019 FOR THE JMAS EFFORT.
